name: Taiwanese Beef Noodles Soup… Version 1.0
ingredients: 60g Cassia Cinnamon Stick (See Woo Brand/Chinese Cinnamon)
steps: Saute everything until fragrant then add Shaoxing wine.
Combine seasoning with Beef in Vacuum Bags and cook at 82C for 10 Hrs (Overnight).
Bring broth ingredients to a boil and simmer.
Skim and reduce down to 1/3 of its volume.
